markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shop directory views from organic traffic on Knowledge Center articles have consistently increased (137 in Jan to 252 in Aug)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Content quality issues noted; GrowthX to investigate and refine processes](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Sunbit planning rebrand rollout by mid-next year, focusing on AI aspects](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Automation of publishing process nearing completion (ETA: Sep 8)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Sunbit aims to evolve social content strategy for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Shop directory views from organic traffic on Knowledge Center articles:](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Consistent month-over-month increase (137 in Jan to 252 in Aug)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Correlated with overall site traffic uptick since May](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Merchant partner signups:](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Lower conversion rates (9 in Jan, 1 in Aug)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Primarily from middle/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [B2C focus:](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [\~95% of website visitors are consumers](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Shop directory conversions show clear ROI (\~$2M GMV, \~$200k profit last year)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Issues identified in recent months:](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Formatting inconsistencies (e.g., header tags, capitalization)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Brand guide violations (e.g., use of exclamation points)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Occasional content structure problems (e.g., bulleted lists instead of paragraphs)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Discrepancies in list articles (e.g., "10 reasons" with only 7 listed)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate causes and refine processes](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Automation Progress

  - [Publishing automation in final stages](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Expected completion date: September 8th](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Anticipated to significantly improve content deployment efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Social Content Strategy

  - [Current social posts deemed "generic and boring"](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Sunbit planning follower growth campaign with more engaging, humorous content](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Exploring unique voice and imagery with help from external agency](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Aim: evolve from informative to entertaining while maintaining value](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing diverse audience needs (B2B vs B2C, various verticals)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)

### Sunbit Rebrand

  - [Planned rollout by mid-next year](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Retaining company name but updating visual identity](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Increased focus on AI aspects of the business](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Challenges include resource allocation and budget approval](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to investigate content quality issues and refine processes](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Sunbit to share examples of content concerns for GrowthX review](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX to complete publishing automation (target: Sep 8)](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Sunbit to develop and share new social media strategy guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with new tone and approach for social content](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing shop directory performance](https://fathom.video/share/a1HW_nUHBJm3CBwT8XcY_Ms4JaWXpkUw?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
